tasks.title: Example: Add warranty alert email template
tasks.description: Create Resend email template for warranty expiry alerts

tasks.title: Example: Filter assets by category
tasks.description: Add category dropdown filter on assets list page

tasks.title: DevOps verification — Supabase migration + Cloudflare Pages setup
tasks.description: Verify all config files for the Supabase + Cloudflare migration: wrangler.toml, open-next.config.ts, next.config.mjs, proxy.ts, supabase/migrations/, env files, build pipeline, supabase client config. Report what's correct and what needs fixing.

tasks.title: QA plan — Supabase migration + Cloudflare Pages setup
tasks.description: Create comprehensive QA plan covering Supabase migration data integrity, schema validation, query compatibility, auth migration; Cloudflare Pages build pipeline, edge compatibility, env vars, domain/DNS; regression for all 5 modules (Usool, Raseed, Haraka, Maal, Banna); RTL/Arabic + LTR/English localization; performance/security; rollback verification.

tasks.title: Fix P1#1 — audit-logs route.ts TS cast (double cast via unknown)
tasks.description: Fix TypeScript error at app/api/audit-logs/route.ts:21 — row as Record<string, unknown> fails because Papa Parse data can be ParserError. Cast via unknown first.

tasks.title: Fix P1#2 — proxy.ts session cookie detection for Supabase SSR
tasks.description: proxy.ts:77 checks for cookie named 'session' but Supabase SSR uses sb-*-auth-token cookies. Fix session detection to use Supabase SSR cookie pattern.

tasks.title: Fix P2#3 — Add Supabase env vars to all .env.example files
tasks.description: NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL, NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY, SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY are missing from all .env.example files.

tasks.title: Fix P2#4 — Update wrangler.toml compatibility_date
tasks.description: wrangler.toml compatibility_date = '2025-05-05' is outdated. Update to current date '2026-05-01'.

tasks.title: QA execution — verify all MZ-004 fixes
tasks.description: Run QA plan phases: build verification, lint, test, and verify all P1/P2 fixes compile correctly.
